data.name: Feature Release: Journal
data.title: 🚀 Feature Release: Journal
data.description: I've added a journal section to the site where I can post quick updates on writing activities and progress.

data.name: Commitment Struggle - Finding Time To Write
data.title: 📌 Blog Post: Commitment Struggle - Finding Time To Write
data.description: Here I'll discuss the fact that my commitment to this site has dropped off recently. Not for lack of desire to write but because life is busy and it's not always easy to do things for yourself.

data.name: Raging Vision
data.title: 📚 New Creative Project: Raging Vision
data.description: A new creative writing project titled 'Raging Vision' has been added to the Creative section. Delve into a dystopian nightmare where vision is the key to survival, and unravel the tragedy behind the madness.

data.name: Samoveen
data.title: 📚 New Creative Project: Samoveen
data.description: A new creative writing project titled 'Samoveen' has been added to the Creative section. Follow Akstos on his interstellar journey to expand humanities footprint, and face the consequences of enslaving the bio-machines needed for survival.

data.name: How hard can it be to write a book?
data.title: 📌 Blog Post: How hard can it be to write a book?
data.description: How hard can it be to write a book? Based on my experience, it can take a very long time, can require a lot of back filling, and feel like the end is a distant dream. Joy and hope however, are ever present.

data.name: The Barn
data.title: 📚 New Creative Project: The Barn
data.description: A new creative writing project titled 'The Barn' has been added to the Creative section. Explore the eerie tale of a farmer's unsettling discovery.
